title: AEP v1.2 F22 Civilian Proof Card Record
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive. Compiles technical evidence into plain-language proof cards (operator source.md L23-27 + L60-66 + L168-176). Operator framing: 'C2PA Content Credentials nutrition label for AI work: Proof Nutrition Labels.' Lineage EXTENDS C2PA Content Credentials per operator L27. HV3 closure: disclosed_signals[] MANDATORY surfacing v1.1 F18 laundering_score >=0.6, F15 missing-witness, F16 attack-flag, F19 coverage-gap. Banned-elision linter: if any v1.1 primitive returned non-PASS, the card MUST contain at least one phrase from civilian_warning_phrasebook[]. Composes_with: v1.1 F18 SourceProvenanceGraph + v1.1 F19 CorpusCoverageWitness (the load-bearing inputs).

bound_to_packet_id.description: Packet ID this card describes. Must resolve to an aepkg.json id.

what_is_being_claimed.description: Operator L61 verbatim row 1. Plain-language statement of the packet's load-bearing claim.

what_evidence_supports_it.description: Operator L62 verbatim row 2. Plain-language summary of source provenance (count + direct vs AI-derived + venue tier). Example: 'This answer used 8 sources. 6 were direct, 2 were AI-derived.' (operator L25)

what_was_tested.description: Operator L63 verbatim row 3. Plain-language summary of falsifier execution + mutation suite + coverage witness. Example: '3 claims were tested.' (operator L25)

what_is_weak_stale_missing_or_ai_derived.description: Operator L64 verbatim row 4. Plain-language summary of all weakness signals (F18 laundering >=0.6, F15 missing-witness, F16 attack-flag, F19 coverage-gap, A8 SRS decay). HV3 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED: if any signal is non-OK, this field MUST contain at least one phrase from civilian_warning_phrasebook[]. Adversary A3 closure: 'This may be AI making things up about itself' is the canonical phrasing when F18 laundering_score > 0.6.

what_action_the_user_should_take_next.description: Operator L65 verbatim row 5. Plain-language next-step recommendation. Civilian vocabulary mandatory.

threshold_breached.description: True if score >= 0.6 per HV3 closure threshold. Triggers mandatory warning in row 4.

civilian_phrasing.description: Civilian translation. HV3 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED: when threshold_breached==true, MUST contain literal phrase 'This may be AI making things up about itself' OR equivalent from civilian_warning_phrasebook[].

any_signal_non_ok.description: Aggregate. True if ANY of the above signals breached threshold. HV3 closure: when true, row 4 MUST contain at least one civilian_warning_phrasebook[] phrase + card visual state MUST be red-border.

banned_elisions_detected.description: Adversary A12 closure. List of v1.1 signals omitted from card without explicit safe_to_elide reason. Empty array on PASS.

required_terms_when_warning_present.description: Adversary A12 + A3 composed closure. The civilian_warning_phrasebook phrases REQUIRED on this card given the disclosed_signals. If any required term is absent, status = FAIL.

banned_terms_detected.description: Banned technical terms detected in any of the 5 rows. Banned list per plan sec18 + operator L74-82: quorum attestation / laundering_score / Ed25519 / attestation graph / DAG / sha256 / state_hash. If non-empty, status = FAIL.

banned_term_list_version.description: Version tag of the banned-term list. Updated when adversary discovers new technical-jargon leak.

trust_dial_level_required.description: Operator L200-203 verbatim. The minimum Trust Dial level this proof card is valid for. F25 binding: if packet's action_class is in safety_floor_categories, this MUST be Professional or higher (HV6 closure).

examples.what_is_being_claimed: This lease summary accurately reflects the source 12-page lease PDF you uploaded.
examples.what_evidence_supports_it: This answer used 1 source (your uploaded lease PDF). The summary was checked against 11 of 12 pages directly; page 9 was not read because it was a duplicate page-break artifact.
examples.what_was_tested: 5 claims were tested: monthly rent, security deposit, lease term, pet clause, early-termination clause. All 5 matched the PDF.
examples.what_is_weak_stale_missing_or_ai_derived: 1 claim is weak: 'Maintenance is the landlord's responsibility.' The PDF says this but with a small-print exception we did not extract. This may be AI making things up about itself if you act on the maintenance clause without re-reading page 7.
examples.what_action_the_user_should_take_next: Trust the rent, deposit, and termination details. Re-read page 7 yourself before relying on the maintenance claim. Not safe for legal disputes without a lawyer.

f19_coverage_gap_flag.civilian_phrasing: Page 9 of the PDF was not read.

required_terms_when_warning_present: This may be AI making things up about itself
